text_excerpt: News | David Mundell MP Skip to main content Main navigation About David News Surgeries & Events In Parliament Contact News MP lobbies Ministers for mineworkers’ pension ‘justice’ Wednesday, 16 July, 2025 LOCAL MP David Mundell has called for urgent action by the UK Government to distribute surplus pension funds due to former mineworkers. He says a number of coal industry retirees in his constituency are amongst those unjustly deprived of their full entitlement. They are members of the long-closed British Coal Staff Superannuation Scheme (BCSSS), which has a £2.3 billion investment reserve... Local News MP calls for fuel duty freeze to be continued at Budget 21st October 2024 FUEL DUTY must remain frozen at the Autumn budget, to help keep costs down for local families and businesses. That’s the view of local Member of Parliament...
